question: Return a table showing the average number of days between the first and second order by acquisition_channel, with columns acquisition_channel, repeat_customers, and avg_days_first_to_second_order.
sql_query:
WITH customer_orders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.customer_id,
        o.order_date,
        o.order_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY o.customer_id 
            ORDER BY o.order_date ASC, o.order_id ASC
        ) AS ord_seq
    FROM core.orders AS o
),
first_second AS (
    SELECT 
        c.customer_id,
        c.acquisition_channel,
        MAX(CASE WHEN co.ord_seq = 1 THEN co.order_date END) AS first_order_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN co.ord_seq = 2 THEN co.order_date END) AS second_order_date
    FROM customer_orders AS co
    JOIN core.customers AS c ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
    WHERE co.ord_seq IN (1, 2)
    GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.acquisition_channel
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 2
),
days_diff AS (
    SELECT 
        acquisition_channel,
        customer_id,
        (second_order_date - first_order_date) AS days_between
    FROM first_second
    WHERE second_order_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    acquisition_channel,
    COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS repeat_customers,
    AVG(days_between) AS avg_days_first_to_second_order
FROM days_diff
GROUP BY acquisition_channel
ORDER BY acquisition_channel
pandas_sql_query: WITH sequenced_orders AS (SELECT o.customer_id, c.acquisition_channel, CAST(o.order_date AS DATE) AS order_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.customer_id ORDER BY CAST(o.order_date AS DATE), o.order_id) AS rn FROM orders o JOIN customers c USING (customer_id)), first_two AS (SELECT customer_id, acquisition_channel, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN order_date END) AS first_order_date, MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN order_date END) AS second_order_date FROM sequenced_orders WHERE rn <= 2 GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT acquisition_channel, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE second_order_date IS NOT NULL) AS repeat_customers, ROUND(AVG(date_diff('day', first_order_date, second_order_date)) FILTER (WHERE second_order_date IS NOT NULL), 4) AS avg_days_first_to_second_order FROM first_two GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY avg_days_first_to_second_order, acquisition_channel
diff_preview: At positional index 1, first diff: social_media != email_campaign
